name: Short Expiry - Clearance: Thunder Adult Dog Food Lamb And Rice 15kg
description: INGREDIENTS: Wheat, Corn, Processed Animal Protein, Wheat Middlings, Bonkalit, Processed Lamb Protein, Rice, Animal Fat, Liver Aroma, Flaxseed, Rice, Salt, Dried Brewer’s Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (Niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (Biotin) – B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. NUTRIENT COMPOSITION Crude Protein 18% Crude Fat 7% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) 4% Crude Ash 8%   DAILY FEEDING GUIDE: DOG WEIGHT GR / DAY 1 – 5 kg 45 – 140 5 – 10 kg 160 – 235 10 – 20 kg 235 – 390 20 – 30 kg 390 – 530 30 – 40 kg 530 – 660 40 – 50 kg 660 – 780 50 – 60 kg 780 – 890
